title: Man-machine collaborative real-time control method for wearable exoskeleton based on artificial intelligence
description: This patent describes an AI-based real-time control method for wearable exoskeletons in power grid overhaul, which constructs demand sequences, uses genetic algorithms to predict collaborative control behaviours, and switches control modes to improve man-machine coordination and safety【749721685346894†L102-L116】.

title: Posture observer for ergonomic observation, posture analysis and reconstruction
description: A system and method for analyzing and reconstructing the actions of a person using non-invasive posture registration and analysis protocols to build digital human simulations for ergonomic observation【599453438653772†L50-L55】.

title: Physics-based simulation of human characters in motion
description: NVIDIA’s patent for a machine-learning-driven physics-based system that generates simulated environments and controls human characters with diverse body shapes to follow trajectories, using CNNs and policy networks to produce realistic behaviours in complex scenes【840509213792413†L49-L97】.

title: Aircraft cockpit training simulator and associated method
description: Describes a distributed aircraft cockpit simulator using multiple panels with power-over-Ethernet cabling and distributed controllers communicating via a publish/subscribe protocol to provide modular human-machine interfaces for training【624895245533724†L48-L56】.

title: Configuration for simulating an interactive voice response system for language interpretation
description: A patent describing a simulation framework that creates a language-agnostic interactive voice-response (IVR) system, routing requests through a machine interpreter to handle multiple human-spoken languages【851242697009394†L50-L63】.
